# Vehicle Leasing Associates (UK)

> Qualified vehicle lease consultants based in Exeter, UK, trading as VLA Media Ltd. Vehicle Leasing Associates (UK) is a group of associates whose extensive combined purchasing power secures cost-effective leasing on cars and vans from all mainstream manufacturers — electric, hybrid, petrol or diesel. The business has 17 years of association with one of Europe's leading finance institutions and serves both individuals and businesses.

## About

- **Business name:** Vehicle Leasing Associates (UK) — VLA Media Ltd
- **Sector:** Vehicle leasing consultancy
- **Location:** Exeter, United Kingdom (serves customers nationwide)
- **Experience:** 17 years associated with a leading European finance institution
- **Positioning:** "The Power of Many" — a group of associates buying across a diverse panel of funders to secure sharper pricing
- **Opening hours:** 9am – 8pm, 7 days a week
- **Phone:** 07352 816278 (+44 7352 816278)
- **Email:** vla.uk@mail.com
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/447352816278

## What they offer

- Car or Van Leasing
- Contract with or without maintenance
- Finance agreements
- Purchase options
- All mainstream manufacturers, any model — electric, hybrid, petrol or diesel

## Why choose VLA (The Power of Many)

- **Manufacturer specialist** — in-depth brand and model knowledge
- **Finance experts** — access to a wide panel of funders and solutions
- **Personal & business specialist** — tailored leasing for individuals and businesses of all sizes
- **Market insights** — up-to-date data to guide smarter decisions
- **Strong partnerships** — established relationships built on trust and results
- **Ongoing support** — a named support specialist throughout your journey
- **Collective buying power** — pay less thanks to the group's purchasing power across funders

## Lease deal examples (illustrative)

- **Renault 4** (electric, 249-mile range) — 3 year personal lease, e.g. £46.08/week, £199.68/month, £2,396.16 initial (inc VAT). Ref-TWC12
- **Renault 5** (electric, 248-mile range) — 3 year personal lease, e.g. £54.70/week, £237.04/month, £2,844.48 initial (inc VAT). Ref-SPC11
- **BYD Atto 2** (electric, 270-mile range) — 3 year business lease, e.g. £45.64/week, £197.78/month, £2,373.36 initial (+VAT). Ref-SPC11
- **Dacia Spring** (electric, 140-mile range) — 3 year personal lease, e.g. £31.03/week, £134.50/month, £1,614.00 initial (inc VAT). Ref-SPC11
- **Nissan Qashqai** (petrol, 45 MPG) — 3 year business lease, e.g. £54.87/week, £237.79/month, £2,853.48 initial (inc VAT)
- **Citroën Berlingo** (diesel van) — 3 year business lease, e.g. £50.49/week, £218.79/month, £2,625.48 initial (+VAT). Ref-SPC11

Every example includes full cover warranty, road tax and no MOT concerns.

## Why lease a new vehicle (vs. keeping an old one)
Older vehicles bring age-related failures, warranty exclusion, outdated technology, low fuel efficiency, frequent repairs and expensive MOTs. Leasing a brand-new vehicle gives fixed monthly payments, no MOT concerns, road tax included, full cover warranty, no depreciation risk and improved economy.

## Electric vehicle focus
The vehicle leasing market is increasingly electric. VLA actively advises on EVs — lower running costs, less maintenance, no tailpipe emissions, no London congestion charge, instant torque and an easy, quiet drive. Most current lease examples are electric (Renault 4, Renault 5, BYD Atto 2, Dacia Spring).

- /contact.html — Personalised quote request

## Contact / Call to action
Request a personalised quote via the website form (vehicle of interest, manufacturer/type, annual mileage, timescale, contact details), call 07352 816278, email vla.uk@mail.com, or message on WhatsApp. Quote the deal reference (e.g. Ref-SPC11) when enquiring about a specific example.

## Notes
Deals are examples only and subject to status, availability and terms. You must be 18 or over. VAT at 20% may be payable. All sales operations are conducted via a licensed credit broker/finance house, and lease contracts include commission via the recommended broker or manufacturer's dealership.
